title: Systemd Services & Timers
html:
Systemd Services & Timers

Contents

  • Service control
  • Inspect
  • Journal (logs)
  • Timers (cron alternative)
  • Boot / power
  • Minimal unit file template

Service control

CommandDescription
 
systemctl status nginx
current state + recent log
systemctl start nginx
systemctl stop nginx
systemctl restart nginx
systemctl reload nginx
SIGHUP-style reload (no restart)
systemctl enable --now nginx
start AND enable at boot
systemctl disable --now nginx
stop AND remove from boot
systemctl mask nginx
prevent any start (even by deps)

Inspect

CommandDescription
 
systemctl list-units --type=service --state=running
running services
systemctl list-unit-files --state=enabled
enabled at boot
systemctl list-dependencies nginx
systemctl cat nginx
show unit file(s) + drop-ins
systemctl edit nginx
create drop-in override
systemctl daemon-reload
after editing unit files
systemctl get-default
current default target (graphical/multi-user)

Journal (logs)

CommandDescription
 
journalctl -u nginx
all logs for service
journalctl -u nginx -f
follow live
journalctl -u nginx --since today
journalctl --since '10 minutes ago'
journalctl -p err -b
errors since this boot
journalctl --vacuum-time=7d
drop journal older than 7 days
journalctl --vacuum-size=500M
cap journal disk usage

Timers (cron alternative)

CommandDescription
 
systemctl list-timers --all
all timers + next run
systemctl start backup.timer
systemctl enable --now backup.timer

Boot / power

CommandDescription
 
systemctl reboot
systemctl poweroff
systemctl suspend
systemctl isolate multi-user.target
switch to text-mode now
systemctl set-default graphical.target
default to GUI

Minimal unit file template

/etc/systemd/system/myapp.service

[Unit]
Description=My App
After=network.target

[Service]
Type=simple
User=myapp
WorkingDirectory=/opt/myapp
ExecStart=/opt/myapp/.venv/bin/python app.py
Restart=on-failure
RestartSec=5

[Install]
WantedBy=multi-user.target

Then: systemctl daemon-reload && systemctl enable --now myapp
